name: basic-manualmap+sysmon
description: Manual mapping (PE injection) observed under both providers. Manual mapping bypasses the PEB loader so KernelProcess never emits ImageLoad for TestDll itself — but the manually-mapped DLL's static imports still trigger normal ImageLoad events for the dependency cascade. Sysmon Event 8 (CreateRemoteThread) fires when the loader stub thread is created in TestTarget. Sysmon Event 7 (ImageLoad) emits for the imported DLLs but should NOT emit for TestDll itself (Sysmon's view of loaded images is also PEB-derived).

extra.notes: Expected Sysmon profile: ProcessAccess yes (PROCESS_VM_WRITE), CreateRemoteThread yes (stub thread), but injected_dll_observed still False because PEB-based discovery cannot see the manually-mapped image.
